description: 30 CMPLX novel scientific tools mapped to the Enhanced Manifold v2 architecture
note: Each tool specifies which of the 24 axes (3 rails × 8 roots) it requires. Tools sharing axes blend through those shared dimensions, enabling structural coupling and cross-domain insights.

tools.name: ProteinFoldMorphon
tools.rail_rationale: α₀₋₃: dihedral angle E8 projection, β₀₋₁: residue pair interactions, γ₀: fold rate temporal

tools.name: QuantumCircuitLambdaReducer
tools.rail_rationale: Full α rail: gate encodings need all 8 independent axes for lambda normal form equivalence

tools.name: EconomicPhaseBoundaryDetector
tools.rail_rationale: Even axes across all three rails: captures phase structure at multiple scales simultaneously

tools.name: MorphonCollisionDrugInteraction
tools.rail_rationale: α₀₋₃: molecule A encoding, β₀₋₃: molecule B encoding. Collision morphon at the rail boundary

tools.name: NiemeierLatticeGenomicAligner
tools.rail_rationale: Full α+β: sequence A on α, sequence B on β. Niemeier composition score from the 16D subspace

tools.name: MultiScaleEntropyMaterialsClassifier
tools.rail_rationale: First 3 axes per rail: captures atomic environment at three scales (local, neighbor shell, bulk)

tools.name: TriadicBondNeuralTopologyDetector
tools.rail_rationale: Every 3rd axis per rail: captures triadic structure (3-neuron motifs need exactly 3 axes per scale)

tools.name: Leech48DClimateStateEmbedder
tools.rail_rationale: ALL 24 axes: climate state requires full Leech embedding (24D state + 24D derivative for 48D)

tools.name: Rule30LambdaShortcutEngine
tools.rail_rationale: α₀₋₂: three reduction paths, β₀: rule encoding, γ₀: temporal step. Minimal footprint, maximal complexity

tools.name: EmergentStabilityClassifier
tools.rail_rationale: ALL 24 axes with equal lane weights: ESS requires uniform coverage across all stratification layers

tools.name: GravitationalWaveMorphon
tools.rail_rationale: α₀₋₃: strain signal E8 projection, γ₀₋₃: temporal frequency structure. No β needed (single source)

tools.name: ViralMutationPathwayPredictor
tools.rail_rationale: α₀₋₂: codon encoding, β₀₋₂: protein structure impact, γ₀₋₁: evolutionary rate

tools.name: CryptographicHashGeometer
tools.rail_rationale: α: input block encoding, β: output block encoding. Geometric structure detection in the α→β mapping

tools.name: KnotInvariantMorphonClassifier
tools.rail_rationale: α₀₋₃: Gauss code writhe encoding, β₀₋₁: crossing sign pairs

tools.name: SemanticDriftMorphonTracker
tools.rail_rationale: α₀₋₃: word context encoding, γ₀₋₇: full temporal rail for drift measurement over time

tools.name: EcosystemCascadePredictor
tools.rail_rationale: α₀₋₅: species interaction matrix, β₀₋₃: resource flow encoding, γ₀₋₃: seasonal dynamics

tools.name: TurbulenceOnsetDetector
tools.rail_rationale: α₀₋₂+α₄₋₆: velocity gradient (2 triads), γ₀₋₂+γ₄₋₆: temporal derivative (2 triads). Paired triads for cascade detection

tools.name: PrimeGapMorphonPredictor
tools.rail_rationale: Full α rail only: prime sequences are purely structural, no interaction or temporal context needed

tools.name: SuperconductorPhaseClassifier
tools.rail_rationale: α₀₋₃: order parameter E8 encoding, β₀₋₃: crystal structure, γ₀₋₇: full temperature/field dynamics

tools.name: CrossDomainEmergenceDetector
tools.rail_rationale: ALL 24 axes: cross-domain comparison requires full geometric fingerprint to detect universality classes

tools.name: QuantumBiologyCoherence
tools.rail_rationale: α₀₋₃: quantum state vector, β₀₋₁: biological environment coupling, γ₀₋₁: decoherence dynamics

tools.name: SocialNetworkPolarization
tools.rail_rationale: α₀₋₃: agent opinion vectors, β₀₋₃: network adjacency structure, γ₀₋₃: opinion dynamics over time

tools.name: HighEntropyAlloyDesigner
tools.rail_rationale: α₀₋₄: elemental composition vector (5+ elements), β₀₋₂: lattice configuration, γ₀₋₁: thermodynamic stability score

tools.name: ConsciousnessIntegrationMapper
tools.rail_rationale: α: neural synchrony patterns, β: information integration complexity (Phi). Full 16D space needed for high-dimensional consciousness state.

tools.name: EarthquakePrecursorDetector
tools.rail_rationale: α₀₋₃: seismic wave features, β₀₋₂: geodetic strain tensor, γ₀₋₄: long-term temporal patterns

tools.name: DarkMatterHaloClassifier
tools.rail_rationale: α₀₋₃: halo density profile, β₀₋₃: particle interaction model, γ₀₋₃: observational signatures (e.g., gamma-ray flux)

tools.name: OceanAcidificationRegimeDetector
tools.rail_rationale: α₀₋₂: chemical state (pH, pCO2), β₀₋₂: biological impact (calcification), γ: full temporal rail for long-term trend analysis

tools.name: ImmuneRepertoireClassifier
tools.rail_rationale: α: V(D)J segment usage frequencies, β₀₋₃: clonal diversity and entropy metrics, γ₀₋₁: temporal response dynamics

tools.name: FinancialSystemicRiskDetector
tools.rail_rationale: α₀₋₅: inter-bank network topology, β₀₋₄: asset correlation matrix, γ₀₋₃: contagion dynamics over time

tools.name: UniversalAttractorMapper
tools.rail_rationale: ALL 24 axes with equal lane weights: required to find universal geometric signatures and attractors across all domains without bias
